name: Libella AAV-hTERT critical limb ischemia registry has unknown status and no posted results
summary: Disease-context AAV-hTERT registry coverage reinforces that human gene-therapy evidence remains no-results.
statement: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT04110964 as an unknown-status five-person Libella AAV-hTERT phase 1 registry in critical limb ischemia, with last-known recruiting status and no posted results in the June 10, 2026 API view.
population_or_model: Adults aged 45 years or older with critical limb ischemia
time_horizon: Estimated completion in December 2020; no posted results as of the June 10, 2026 API view
quantitative_note: Estimated enrollment was five; primary outcome was incidence of adverse events.
caveats: No posted human safety or efficacy results are available.
The study is single-arm and disease-specific.
This boundary record should not be treated as evidence for broad aging or LEV-relevant effect.
